compute_mode.contract: Execution layout contract. Singleton work units degrade to serial/no-op behavior.
compute_mode.label: Compute Layout
compute_mode.question: How should execution work be laid out?
compute_mode.summary: Default to serial execution, or request local parallelism over models, horizons, targets, or OOS dates.

parallel_by_horizon.label: Parallelize Forecast Horizons
parallel_by_horizon.summary: Parallelize across forecast horizons when multiple horizons exist.

parallel_by_model.label: Parallelize Model Variants
parallel_by_model.summary: Parallelize across model-family variants when a model sweep exists.

parallel_by_oos_date.label: Parallelize OOS Dates
parallel_by_oos_date.summary: Parallelize across origin dates in a long pseudo-OOS window.

parallel_by_target.label: Parallelize Targets
parallel_by_target.summary: Parallelize across targets in a multi-target run.

serial.label: Serial (Default)
serial.summary: Default. Run one unit of work at a time.

contemporaneous_x_rule.contract: Forecast information-set contract. Allowing same-period predictors is an oracle/data-leak benchmark.
contemporaneous_x_rule.label: Contemporaneous X Rule
contemporaneous_x_rule.question: Can same-period predictors enter the forecast information set?
contemporaneous_x_rule.summary: Controls whether predictors observed at the target period are allowed.

allow_same_period_predictors.label: Allow Same-Period Predictors
allow_same_period_predictors.summary: Oracle benchmark. Permit same-period X values.

forbid_same_period_predictors.label: Forbid Same-Period Predictors (Default)
forbid_same_period_predictors.summary: Default. Use realistic forecasting information only.

custom_source_format.contract: Use csv for a date-indexed CSV panel and parquet for a Parquet panel. Use none only when no custom data is selected.
custom_source_format.label: Custom File Format
custom_source_format.question: What file format does the custom data use?
custom_source_format.summary: Active only when Custom Data Use is Custom Only or FRED + Custom.

csv.label: CSV
csv.summary: A date-indexed CSV file with numeric series columns.

none.label: No Custom File
none.summary: No custom file is used. Valid only when Custom Data Use is FRED Only.

parquet.label: Parquet
parquet.summary: A Parquet file with a DatetimeIndex or parseable date first column.

custom_source_format.warning: Check the detailed docs for required date index and numeric-column shape.

custom_source_policy.contract: When custom data is selected, choose custom_source_format and custom_source_schema, then provide leaf_config.custom_source_path. custom_panel_only supports one FRED source panel; official_plus_custom supports single or composite FRED panels.
custom_source_policy.label: Custom Data Use
custom_source_policy.question: Do you want FRED data, custom data, or FRED data plus custom data?
custom_source_policy.summary: Choose FRED data only, custom data only, or FRED data plus custom columns.

custom_panel_only.label: Use Custom Data Only
custom_panel_only.summary: Use a custom file instead of the selected single FRED source panel. The custom schema must match the selected source panel.

official_only.label: Use FRED Data Only (Default)
official_only.summary: Use only the selected FRED source panel.

official_plus_custom.label: Add Custom Data To FRED Data
official_plus_custom.summary: Load the selected FRED source panel and append custom columns after frequency alignment.

custom_source_policy.warning: Custom files must follow the frequency and schema contract in the docs before the run is reproducible.

custom_source_schema.contract: Use none with FRED-only data. Use fred_md for monthly national macro panels, fred_qd for quarterly national macro panels, and fred_sd for state-level panels that will be aligned to the selected Layer 1 frequency.
custom_source_schema.label: Custom File Schema
custom_source_schema.question: Which FRED-style schema does the custom file follow?
custom_source_schema.summary: Active only when a custom file is selected. Custom Only must match the selected Source Panel; FRED + Custom may use MD, QD, or SD-like columns.

fred_md.label: FRED-MD-Like Monthly Panel
fred_md.summary: Date-indexed monthly national macro columns named like series IDs.

fred_qd.label: FRED-QD-Like Quarterly Panel
fred_qd.summary: Date-indexed quarterly national macro columns named like series IDs.

fred_sd.label: FRED-SD-Like State Panel
fred_sd.summary: Date-indexed state-level columns, normally monthly before Layer 1 alignment.

none.label: No Custom Schema
none.summary: No custom schema is used. Valid only when Custom Data Use is FRED Only.

custom_source_schema.warning: This is a schema contract, not a loader choice. The file path still lives in leaf_config.custom_source_path.

dataset.contract: Layer 1 source contract. FRED-MD implies monthly data, FRED-QD implies quarterly data, and standalone FRED-SD requires an explicit frequency. User-supplied files are configured by the custom source axes, not by this source-panel axis.
dataset.label: Source Panel
dataset.question: Which FRED source panel starts the study?
dataset.summary: Selects the official FRED-family panel before optional custom-file use, target, timing, or representation decisions.

fred_md.label: FRED-MD
fred_md.summary: Monthly national macro panel with official transform codes.

fred_md+fred_sd.label: FRED-MD + FRED-SD
fred_md+fred_sd.summary: Monthly national panel plus state-level source columns.

fred_qd.label: FRED-QD
fred_qd.summary: Quarterly national macro panel with official transform codes.

fred_qd+fred_sd.label: FRED-QD + FRED-SD
fred_qd+fred_sd.summary: Quarterly national panel plus state-level source columns.

fred_sd.label: FRED-SD
fred_sd.summary: State-level panel; choose monthly or quarterly frequency explicitly.

failure_policy.contract: Runtime failure contract. Sweep-compatible modes decide whether invalid variants stop or are skipped.
failure_policy.label: Failure Handling
failure_policy.question: What should happen when a run, variant, or cell fails?
failure_policy.summary: Controls whether the run stops, skips failed units, warns, or preserves partial results.

fail_fast.label: Stop on First Failure (Default)
fail_fast.summary: Default. Abort immediately so the first error can be investigated.

save_partial_results.label: Save Partial Results
save_partial_results.summary: Persist completed artifacts before aborting or reporting failure.

skip_failed_cell.label: Skip Failed Sweep Cells
skip_failed_cell.summary: Continue a sweep while recording failed variant status.

skip_failed_model.label: Skip Failed Model Branches
skip_failed_model.summary: Continue after failures scoped to one model branch.

warn_only.label: Warn Only
warn_only.summary: Emit warnings and continue when failures are recoverable.

fred_sd_frequency_policy.contract: FRED-SD source-evidence contract. Layer 2 consumes the resulting native-frequency report for representation choices.
fred_sd_frequency_policy.label: FRED-SD Frequency Gate
fred_sd_frequency_policy.question: How strictly should FRED-SD native-frequency evidence be enforced?
fred_sd_frequency_policy.summary: No-op unless the dataset includes FRED-SD; non-default values gate mixed native frequencies.

allow_mixed_frequency.label: Allow Mixed Frequencies
allow_mixed_frequency.summary: Accept mixed known native frequencies after reporting them.

reject_mixed_known_frequency.label: Reject Mixed Known Frequencies
reject_mixed_known_frequency.summary: Fail if selected FRED-SD series contain multiple known native frequencies.

report_only.label: Report Only (Default)
report_only.summary: Default. Record native-frequency evidence without rejecting series.

require_single_known_frequency.label: Require Single Known Frequency
require_single_known_frequency.summary: Require all selected FRED-SD series to share one known native frequency.

fred_sd_state_group.contract: FRED-SD state-selection contract. Custom groups require leaf_config.sd_states.
fred_sd_state_group.label: FRED-SD State Group
fred_sd_state_group.question: Which state set should enter the FRED-SD source frame?
fred_sd_state_group.summary: No-op unless the dataset includes FRED-SD; group choices resolve to explicit state selectors.

census_division_east_north_central.label: Census Division: East North Central
census_division_east_north_central.summary: Use East North Central division states.

census_division_east_south_central.label: Census Division: East South Central
census_division_east_south_central.summary: Use East South Central division states.

census_division_west_north_central.label: Census Division: West North Central
census_division_west_north_central.summary: Use West North Central division states.

census_division_west_south_central.label: Census Division: West South Central
census_division_west_south_central.summary: Use West South Central division states.

contiguous_48_plus_dc.label: Contiguous 48 + DC
contiguous_48_plus_dc.summary: Use contiguous states plus District of Columbia.

fred_sd_variable_group.contract: FRED-SD variable-selection contract. Custom groups require leaf_config.sd_variables.
fred_sd_variable_group.label: FRED-SD Variable Group
fred_sd_variable_group.question: Which FRED-SD variable family should enter the source frame?
fred_sd_variable_group.summary: No-op unless the dataset includes FRED-SD; group choices resolve to explicit variable selectors.

all_sd_variables.label: All FRED-SD Variables (Default)
all_sd_variables.summary: Use all available FRED-SD variable families.

direct_analog_high_confidence.label: Direct Analog: High Confidence
direct_analog_high_confidence.summary: Use variables with strong national-panel analogs.

no_reliable_analog.label: No Reliable Analog
no_reliable_analog.summary: Use variables without reliable national-panel analogs.

provisional_analog_medium.label: Provisional Analog: Medium
provisional_analog_medium.summary: Use variables with provisional national-panel analogs.

semantic_review_outputs.label: Semantic Review Outputs
semantic_review_outputs.summary: Use variables grouped by semantic review outputs.

frequency.contract: Frequency contract. FRED-MD routes are monthly, FRED-QD routes are quarterly, and FRED-SD-only routes choose one explicitly.
frequency.label: Frequency
frequency.question: What calendar frequency should the FRED frame use?
frequency.summary: Derived for FRED-MD/QD/composites and required for standalone FRED-SD.

information_set_type.contract: Information-set contract consumed before representation construction.
information_set_type.label: Information Set
information_set_type.question: Which data-availability regime defines the source frame?
information_set_type.summary: Simple runs use final revised data; pseudo-OOS revised data applies forecasting-time availability discipline on revised data.

final_revised_data.label: Final Revised Data (Default)
final_revised_data.summary: Default. Use the final revised panel.

pseudo_oos_on_revised_data.label: Pseudo-OOS on Revised Data
pseudo_oos_on_revised_data.summary: Use revised data while applying pseudo-out-of-sample availability discipline.

missing_availability.contract: Official-frame availability contract. This is not raw-source repair.
missing_availability.label: Availability Missing Policy
missing_availability.question: How should official-frame availability gaps be handled?
missing_availability.summary: Runs after the FRED frame exists and before Layer 2 representation construction.

keep_available_rows.label: Keep Available Rows
keep_available_rows.summary: Keep rows with available target/predictor information.

require_complete_rows.label: Require Complete Rows
require_complete_rows.summary: Keep only rows complete across the FRED frame.

zero_fill_leading_predictor_gaps.label: Zero-Fill Leading Predictor Gaps (Default)
zero_fill_leading_predictor_gaps.summary: Default. Fill leading predictor gaps after official-frame construction.

official_transform_policy.contract: FRED-transform contract. FRED-SD inferred transforms are Layer 2 researcher-chosen transformations, not source definitions.
official_transform_policy.label: Official Transform Policy
official_transform_policy.question: Should FRED-provided transform codes be applied?
official_transform_policy.summary: Controls FRED-MD/QD t-code application while building the FRED frame.

keep_official_raw_scale.label: Keep Official Raw Scale
keep_official_raw_scale.summary: Preserve source scale without official t-code transformation.

official_transform_scope.contract: Scope contract for official transform application.
official_transform_scope.label: Official Transform Scope
official_transform_scope.question: Which columns should official transforms apply to?
official_transform_scope.summary: Chooses whether target, predictors, both, or neither receive official transforms.

predictors_only.label: Predictors Only
predictors_only.summary: Apply official transforms only to predictors.

target_and_predictors.label: Target and Predictors (Default)
target_and_predictors.summary: Default. Apply official transforms to target and predictors.

target_only.label: Target Only
target_only.summary: Apply official transforms only to the target.

raw_missing_policy.contract: Raw-source cleaning contract before official transforms. Layer 2 missing policies act later on the representation frame.
raw_missing_policy.label: Raw Missing Policy
raw_missing_policy.question: How should missing values already present in the raw source be handled?
raw_missing_policy.summary: Runs before official transforms or t-codes, so it can change transformed outputs.

drop_raw_missing_rows.label: Drop Raw Missing Rows
drop_raw_missing_rows.summary: Drop rows with raw-source missing values before transforms.

zero_fill_leading_predictor_missing_befo.label: Zero-Fill Leading Predictor Gaps
zero_fill_leading_predictor_missing_befo.summary: Fill leading predictor gaps before official transforms.

raw_outlier_policy.contract: Raw-source outlier contract before official transforms. Layer 2 outlier policies act later on representation inputs.
raw_outlier_policy.label: Raw Outlier Policy
raw_outlier_policy.question: How should outliers already present in the raw source be handled?
raw_outlier_policy.summary: Runs before official transforms or t-codes.

iqr_clip_raw.label: IQR Clip Raw Values
iqr_clip_raw.summary: Clip raw outliers using an interquartile-range rule.

mad_clip_raw.label: MAD Clip Raw Values
mad_clip_raw.summary: Clip raw outliers using a median-absolute-deviation rule.

set_raw_outliers_to_missing.label: Set Raw Outliers to Missing
set_raw_outliers_to_missing.summary: Mark detected raw outliers as missing before later handling.

zscore_clip_raw.label: Z-Score Clip Raw Values
zscore_clip_raw.summary: Clip raw outliers using a z-score rule.

release_lag_rule.contract: Release-lag contract. Series-specific lag requires leaf_config.release_lag_per_series.
release_lag_rule.label: Release Lag Rule
release_lag_rule.question: Should predictor release lags be simulated?
release_lag_rule.summary: Controls publication-lag discipline before Layer 2 uses the source frame.

fixed_lag_all_series.label: Fixed Lag for All Series
fixed_lag_all_series.summary: Apply one lag rule to all predictors.

ignore_release_lag.label: Ignore Release Lag (Default)
ignore_release_lag.summary: Default. Do not shift predictors by publication lag.

reproducibility_mode.contract: Seed and determinism contract applied before stochastic model code runs.
reproducibility_mode.label: Reproducibility
reproducibility_mode.question: How strictly should stochastic components be pinned?
reproducibility_mode.summary: Controls seeds and deterministic-library settings before model execution.

best_effort.label: Best-Effort Seeded Run
best_effort.summary: Apply available seeds and mark the run as non-strict.

seeded_reproducible.label: Seeded Run (Default)
seeded_reproducible.summary: Default. Seed Python, NumPy, and optional torch without strict backend flags.

strict_reproducible.label: Strict Reproducible Run
strict_reproducible.summary: Use deterministic-library settings for replication-grade reruns.

study_scope.contract: Primary Layer 0 study-shape contract. It derives the Layer 1 target_structure and determines whether downstream method axes are fixed or sweep-aware.
study_scope.label: Study Scope
study_scope.question: How many targets and methods should this study compare?
study_scope.summary: Sets target cardinality and whether the method path is fixed or compared across alternatives.

multiple_targets_compare_methods.label: Multiple Targets, Compare Methods
multiple_targets_compare_methods.summary: Use multiple targets and compare one or more downstream method axes across the same study.

multiple_targets_one_method.label: Multiple Targets, One Method
multiple_targets_one_method.summary: Use multiple targets and one fixed forecasting method path shared across targets.

one_target_compare_methods.label: One Target, Compare Methods
one_target_compare_methods.summary: Use one target and compare multiple model, representation, preprocessing, horizon, or tuning choices.

one_target_one_method.label: One Target, One Method
one_target_one_method.summary: Use one target and one fixed forecasting method path.

target_structure.contract: Target cardinality contract. One-target scopes require target_structure=single_target; multiple-target scopes require target_structure=multi_target.
target_structure.label: Target Structure
target_structure.question: Is the study forecasting one target or multiple targets?
target_structure.summary: Must match Layer 0 Study Scope and the target fields in leaf_config.

multi_target.label: Multiple Targets
multi_target.summary: Use leaf_config.targets for a target panel.

single_target.label: Single Target (Default)
single_target.summary: Use leaf_config.target for one forecast target.

variable_universe.contract: Source-column universe contract. Non-default choices require the matching leaf_config column lists or mappings.
variable_universe.label: Variable Universe
variable_universe.question: Which source columns are eligible before Layer 2 builds features?
variable_universe.summary: Filters the FRED source universe before representation construction.

all_variables.label: All Variables (Default)
all_variables.summary: Use the full eligible source-column universe.

category_variables.label: Category Variables
category_variables.summary: Use columns mapped to a selected category.

core_variables.label: Core Variables
core_variables.summary: Use the package's core source-variable subset.

1_data_task.label: Source Identity
1_data_task.summary: Choose the FRED source family, optional custom data use, custom file schema, and calendar frequency.

1_data_task.label: Information Regime
1_data_task.summary: Define the information set and timing discipline used before Layer 2 sees the frame.

1_data_task.condition: Active only when dataset includes fred_sd.
1_data_task.label: FRED-SD Source Scope
1_data_task.summary: Restrict FRED-SD native frequency, states, and workbook variables.

1_data_task.condition: Target cardinality is constrained by Layer 0 Study Scope.
1_data_task.label: Target Request
1_data_task.summary: Record whether Layer 1 carries one target or multiple targets; target IDs and horizons live in leaf_config.

1_data_task.label: Source Universe
1_data_task.summary: Limit eligible source columns before representation construction.

1_data_task.label: Raw Source Quality
1_data_task.summary: Handle missing values and outliers already present in the raw source before official transforms.

1_data_task.label: Official Frame Policy
1_data_task.summary: Apply FRED transforms and close availability gaps in the Layer 1 FRED frame.

required_companions: at least two active block sources for mixed_feature_blocks
registered custom block or custom combiner for custom_feature_blocks

operational_narrow_contracts.pruning_surface: Navigator compatibility, compiler blocked_reasons, and runtime route guard
required_companions: registered custom model_family or built-in MIDAS model_family

operational_narrow_contracts.pruning_surface: Layer 3 capability matrix and compiler blocked_reasons

deviations_from_original_paper: This entry is a package-native runnable path, not a byte-identical replication package.
Vintage availability is revised/pseudo-OOS unless a real-time source adapter is supplied.
The model grid is represented as individual navigator recipes or a sweep, not as the full paper table bundle.
replications.notebook_snippet:
from macrocast.navigator import get_replication_entry, replication_recipe_yaml
from macrocast import compile_recipe_dict, run_compiled_recipe
import yaml
recipe = yaml.safe_load(replication_recipe_yaml('goulet-coulombe-2021-fred-md-ridge'))
compiled = compile_recipe_dict(recipe)
result = run_compiled_recipe(compiled.compiled, output_root='results/gc2021')
replications.paper_name: Goulet Coulombe et al. (2021), International Journal of Forecasting
replications.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: goulet-coulombe-2021-fred-md-ridge
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      study_scope: one_target_one_method
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      frequency: monthly
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
      variable_universe: all_variables
      missing_availability: zero_fill_leading_predictor_gaps
      release_lag_rule: ignore_release_lag
      contemporaneous_x_rule: forbid_same_period_predictors
      official_transform_policy: apply_official_tcode
      official_transform_scope: target_and_predictors
      raw_missing_policy: zero_fill_leading_predictor_missing_before_tcode
      raw_outlier_policy: preserve_raw_outliers
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
      - 3
      - 6
      - 12
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      horizon_target_construction: future_target_level_t_plus_h
      target_transform_policy: official_tcode_transformed
      x_transform_policy: official_tcode_transformed
      tcode_policy: official_tcode_then_extra_preprocess
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: standard
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: official_tcode_then_extra
      preprocess_fit_scope: train_only
      inverse_transform_policy: target_only
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
      target_lag_block: none
      x_lag_feature_block: none
      factor_feature_block: none
      level_feature_block: none
      temporal_feature_block: none
      rotation_feature_block: none
      feature_block_combination: replace_with_selected_blocks
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: autoregressive_bic
      feature_builder: raw_feature_panel
      model_family: ridge
      forecast_type: direct
      forecast_object: point_mean
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    fixed_axes:
      export_format: json
      saved_objects: full_bundle
      provenance_fields: full
      artifact_granularity: aggregated
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 60
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes:
      equal_predictive: dm
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none
replications.short_description: FRED-MD style macro forecasting path with official transformations, raw-panel ridge generator, AR-BIC benchmark, and MSFE evaluation.

deviations_from_original_paper: Synthetic fixture route; no external paper claims.
replications.notebook_snippet:
from macrocast.navigator import replication_recipe_yaml
import yaml
recipe = yaml.safe_load(replication_recipe_yaml('synthetic-replication-roundtrip'))
replications.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: synthetic-replication-roundtrip-navigator
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      study_scope: one_target_one_method
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      target_transform_policy: raw_level
      x_transform_policy: raw_level
      tcode_policy: raw_only
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: none
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: none
      preprocess_fit_scope: not_applicable
      inverse_transform_policy: none
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: zero_change
      feature_builder: target_lag_features
      model_family: ar
      forecast_type: iterated
      forecast_object: point_mean
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 5
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes: {}
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none
replications.short_description: Small fixture-safe replication route used to verify recipe lowering and artifact contracts.

deviations_from_original_paper: Runtime fixture route; no paper-identical claims.
Uses current package FRED-SD fixture unless an official vintage is supplied.
Demonstrates the almonp MIDAS weight-family branch, not a full MIDAS grid.
replications.notebook_snippet:
from macrocast.navigator import replication_recipe_yaml
from macrocast import compile_recipe_dict, run_compiled_recipe
import yaml
recipe = yaml.safe_load(replication_recipe_yaml('fred-sd-midasr-almonp-direct'))
compiled = compile_recipe_dict(recipe)
result = run_compiled_recipe(
    compiled.compiled,
    output_root='results/fred_sd_midasr_almonp',
    local_raw_source='tests/fixtures/fred_sd_sample.csv',
)
replications.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: fred-sd-midasr-almonp-direct
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      study_scope: one_target_one_method
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_sd
      frequency: monthly
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
      fred_sd_frequency_policy: report_only
      official_transform_policy: keep_official_raw_scale
      raw_missing_policy: preserve_raw_missing
      raw_outlier_policy: preserve_raw_outliers
    leaf_config:
      target: UR_CA
      horizons:
      - 1
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      fred_sd_mixed_frequency_representation: mixed_frequency_model_adapter
      horizon_target_construction: future_target_level_t_plus_h
      target_transform_policy: raw_level
      x_transform_policy: raw_level
      tcode_policy: raw_only
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: none
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: none
      preprocess_fit_scope: not_applicable
      inverse_transform_policy: none
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
      feature_block_set: transformed_predictors
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: zero_change
      feature_builder: raw_feature_panel
      model_family: midasr
      midasr_weight_family: almonp
      forecast_type: direct
      forecast_object: point_mean
    leaf_config:
      training_config:
        midas_max_lag: 3
        midasr_almonp_degree: 2
        midasr_max_terms: 12
        midasr_max_nfev: 500
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 5
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes: {}
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none
replications.short_description: Fixture-safe FRED-SD direct forecast using Layer 2 native-frequency adapter payloads and the built-in Layer 3 midasr/almonp restricted MIDAS executor.

samples.label: model-benchmark-ar-vs-zero-change
samples.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: model-benchmark-ar-vs-zero-change
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      study_scope: one_target_one_method
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
      - 3
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      target_transform_policy: raw_level
      x_transform_policy: raw_level
      tcode_policy: raw_only
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none

      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: none
      preprocess_fit_scope: not_applicable
      inverse_transform_policy: none
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: zero_change
      feature_builder: target_lag_features
      model_family: ar
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe

    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 5
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes: {}
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none

samples.label: synthetic-replication-roundtrip-navigator
samples.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: synthetic-replication-roundtrip-navigator
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      study_scope: one_target_one_method
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      target_transform_policy: raw_level
      x_transform_policy: raw_level
      tcode_policy: raw_only
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: none
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: none
      preprocess_fit_scope: not_applicable
      inverse_transform_policy: none
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: zero_change
      feature_builder: target_lag_features
      model_family: ar
      forecast_type: iterated
      forecast_object: point_mean
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 5
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes: {}
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none

samples.label: goulet-coulombe-2021-fred-md-ridge
samples.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: goulet-coulombe-2021-fred-md-ridge
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      study_scope: one_target_one_method
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      frequency: monthly
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
      variable_universe: all_variables
      missing_availability: zero_fill_leading_predictor_gaps
      release_lag_rule: ignore_release_lag
      contemporaneous_x_rule: forbid_same_period_predictors
      official_transform_policy: apply_official_tcode
      official_transform_scope: target_and_predictors
      raw_missing_policy: zero_fill_leading_predictor_missing_before_tcode
      raw_outlier_policy: preserve_raw_outliers
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
      - 3
      - 6
      - 12
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      horizon_target_construction: future_target_level_t_plus_h
      target_transform_policy: official_tcode_transformed
      x_transform_policy: official_tcode_transformed
      tcode_policy: official_tcode_then_extra_preprocess
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: standard
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: official_tcode_then_extra
      preprocess_fit_scope: train_only
      inverse_transform_policy: target_only
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
      target_lag_block: none
      x_lag_feature_block: none
      factor_feature_block: none
      level_feature_block: none
      temporal_feature_block: none
      rotation_feature_block: none
      feature_block_combination: replace_with_selected_blocks
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: autoregressive_bic
      feature_builder: raw_feature_panel
      model_family: ridge
      forecast_type: direct
      forecast_object: point_mean
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    fixed_axes:
      export_format: json
      saved_objects: full_bundle
      provenance_fields: full
      artifact_granularity: aggregated
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 60
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes:
      equal_predictive: dm
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none

future_cells.opening_rule: open only after Layer 2 emits an explicit sequence/tensor representation and Layer 3 writes typed sequence payloads
hold_last_observed, observed_future_x, scheduled_known_future_x, and recursive_x_model(ar1) are operational; broader recursively forecast future-X paths remain gated
requires: explicit hold_last_observed, observed_future_x, scheduled_known_future_x, or recursive_x_model(ar1) exogenous-X scenario

blocked.iterated: raw-panel iterated runtime requires an explicit future-X scenario

blocked.direct: direct target-lag-only runtime is not implemented

status_catalog.blocked_by_incompatibility: the selected values are valid individually but cannot compose in the current runtime
status_catalog.not_supported_yet: the cell is reserved for a future runtime contract and is not accepted as an executable recipe value
status_catalog.operational: the selected cell has a runtime contract and can execute
status_catalog.operational_narrow: the selected cell executes for a named narrow contract slice while broader variants remain gated
status_catalog.registry_only: the registry names a placeholder or extension hook without a built-in runtime contract
